recommendations.title: Black Lightning
recommendations.overview: A Moscow University student discovers that his otherwise unremarkable car can fly. After his father is attacked, he decides to use the car to fight crime and becomes the city's defender against an evil millionaire.

recommendations.title: Mercy
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.

recommendations.title: Profile
recommendations.overview: Looking to investigate recruitment techniques of ISIS to lure women into Syria, a journalist creates a Facebook profile of a Muslim convert. When an ISIS recruiter contacts her online character, she experiences the process first hand.

recommendations.title: Mira
recommendations.overview: Near future. Lera Arabova is a 15-year-old girl who lives with her family in Vladivostok. Lera's father has been working at the orbiting space station "Mira" for many years and has long lost contact with his daughter, turning only into a voice on the

recommendations.title: Day Watch
recommendations.overview: A man who serves in the war between the forces of Light and Dark comes into possession of a device that can restore life to Moscow, which was nearly destroyed by an apocalyptic event.

recommendations.title: Ben-Hur
recommendations.overview: A falsely accused nobleman survives years of slavery to take vengeance on his best friend who betrayed him.

recommendations.title: The Spacewalker
recommendations.overview: March 1965. In the heat of the Cold War, the USA and the USSR are competing for supremacy in space. What both superpowers aim for in this race, is to be the first to have a man walk in outer space. To accomplish that, no price is too high and no risk

recommendations.title: Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter
recommendations.overview: President Lincoln's mother is killed by a supernatural creature, which fuels his passion to crush vampires and their slave-owning helpers.

recommendations.title: Wanted

recommendations.title: Night Watch
